name: fillerama
title: Fillerama
description: Generate filler text using quotes from Futurama, The Simpsons, Monty Python, Arrested Development, Dexter, Doctor Who, and Star Wars.
author: pryley

commands.name: generate-filler
commands.title: Generate Filler Text
commands.subtitle: Fillerama
commands.description: Pick a show and sentence count, then paste into the active app.

commands.name: generate-headline
commands.title: Generate Filler Headline
commands.subtitle: Fillerama
commands.description: Pick a show, then paste a headline into the active app.
